name: Swin Transformer hierarchical stages

task.description: Create a single 1920x1080 self-contained HTML file using ONLY inline CSS and inline SVG reproducing the Swin Transformer hierarchical architecture. Title 'Swin Transformer (Liu et al., 2021)'. Left-to-right: 'Patch Partition' -> Stage 1 (Linear Embedding + 2x Swin Block, HxW/4 x C) -> Stage 2 (Patch Merging + 2x Swin Block, H/8 x 2C) -> Stage 3 (Patch Merging + 6x Swin Block, H/16 x 4C) -> Stage 4 (Patch Merging + 2x Swin Block, H/32 x 8C). Include an inset of TWO consecutive Swin blocks showing W-MSA then SW-MSA (windowed and shifted-window attention) each with LN, MLP, and residual adds. The four stages are equal-height aligned columns; the inset is a boxed detail.
requirements: Four stage columns (Stage 1-4) are shown left to right, equal-height and top/bottom aligned
Each stage lists its components (Patch Merging/Linear Embedding + N x Swin Block) and its resolution x channel annotation (e.g. H/8 x 2C)
The block counts per stage are 2,2,6,2 respectively and are visible
An inset shows two consecutive Swin blocks: W-MSA then SW-MSA, each with LN, MLP, and residual adds
Patch Merging steps connect consecutive stages with labeled arrows
No element overlaps; arrows do not cross unrelated block labels
Sibling stage columns are equal width with uniform gutters
The inset detail box does not overlap the main stage row
The whole figure fits in 1920x1080 with no scrollbar
A legend maps colors/arrow styles; each block has a shape annotation; nothing clipped or misaligned

rv_html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Swin Transformer Architecture</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 1920px;
            height: 1080px;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fa 0%, #e9ecef 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <svg width="1920" height="1080" viewBox="0 0 1920 1080">
            <!-- Background -->
            <defs>
                <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
                    <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#f8f9fa;stop-opacity:1" />
                    <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#e9ecef;stop-opacity:1" />
                </linearGradient>
                
                <!-- Drop shadow filter -->
                <filter id="dropShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
                    <feDropShadow dx="3" dy="3" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#00000020"/>
                </filter>
                
                <!-- Arrow marker -->
                <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" 
                        refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
                    <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#2c3e50" />
                </marker>
            </defs>
            
            <rect width="1920" height="1080" fill="url(#bgGrad)"/>
            
            <!-- Title -->
            <text x="960" y="60" text-anchor="middle" 
                  font-size="48" font-weight="bold" fill="#2c3e50">
                Swin Transformer (Liu et al., 2021)
            </text>
            
            <!-- Main Architecture Flow -->
            
            <!-- Patch Partition -->
            <g id="patch-partition">
                <rect x="80" y="150" width="180" height="400" 
                      fill="#3498db" stroke="#2980b9" stroke-width="3" 
                      rx="12" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                <text x="170" y="180" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Patch</text>
                <text x="170" y="205" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Partition</text>
                <text x="170" y="240" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" fill="white">4×4 patches</text>
                <text x="170" y="260" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" fill="white">H×W → H/4×W/4</text>
                
                <!-- Visual representation of patches -->
                <g transform="translate(120, 300)">
                    <rect x="0" y="0" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="20" y="0" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="40" y="0" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="60" y="0" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="0" y="20" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="20" y="20" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="40" y="20" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="60" y="20" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="0" y="40" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="20" y="40" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="40" y="40" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                    <rect x="60" y="40" width="20" height="20" fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#bdc3c7"/>
                </g>
            </g>
            
            <!-- Arrow 1 -->
            <line x1="260" y1="350" x2="320" y2="350" 
                  stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
            
            <!-- Stage 1 -->
            <g id="stage1">
                <rect x="340" y="150" width="200" height="400" 
                      fill="#e74c3c" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="3" 
                      rx="12" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                <text x="440" y="180" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Stage 1</text>
                <text x="440" y="205" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" fill="white">H/4×W/4 × C</text>
                
                <!-- Linear Embedding -->
                <rect x="360" y="230" width="160" height="40" 
                      fill="#f39c12" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="440" y="255" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Linear Embedding</text>
                
                <!-- Swin Blocks -->
                <rect x="360" y="290" width="160" height="60" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="440" y="315" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Swin Block</text>
                <text x="440" y="335" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(W-MSA)</text>
                
                <rect x="360" y="370" width="160" height="60" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="440" y="395" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Swin Block</text>
                <text x="440" y="415" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(SW-MSA)</text>
                
                <text x="440" y="520" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">2× Swin Blocks</text>
            </g>
            
            <!-- Arrow 2 -->
            <line x1="540" y1="350" x2="600" y2="350" 
                  stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
            
            <!-- Stage 2 -->
            <g id="stage2">
                <rect x="620" y="150" width="200" height="400" 
                      fill="#e74c3c" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="3" 
                      rx="12" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                <text x="720" y="180" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Stage 2</text>
                <text x="720" y="205" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" fill="white">H/8×W/8 × 2C</text>
                
                <!-- Patch Merging -->
                <rect x="640" y="230" width="160" height="40" 
                      fill="#f39c12" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="720" y="255" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Patch Merging</text>
                
                <!-- Swin Blocks -->
                <rect x="640" y="290" width="160" height="60" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="720" y="315" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Swin Block</text>
                <text x="720" y="335" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(W-MSA)</text>
                
                <rect x="640" y="370" width="160" height="60" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="720" y="395" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Swin Block</text>
                <text x="720" y="415" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(SW-MSA)</text>
                
                <text x="720" y="520" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">2× Swin Blocks</text>
            </g>
            
            <!-- Arrow 3 -->
            <line x1="820" y1="350" x2="880" y2="350" 
                  stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
            
            <!-- Stage 3 -->
            <g id="stage3">
                <rect x="900" y="150" width="200" height="400" 
                      fill="#e74c3c" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="3" 
                      rx="12" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                <text x="1000" y="180" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Stage 3</text>
                <text x="1000" y="205" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" fill="white">H/16×W/16 × 4C</text>
                
                <!-- Patch Merging -->
                <rect x="920" y="230" width="160" height="40" 
                      fill="#f39c12" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="1000" y="255" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Patch Merging</text>
                
                <!-- Multiple Swin Blocks -->
                <rect x="920" y="290" width="160" height="120" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="1000" y="320" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">6× Swin Blocks</text>
                <text x="1000" y="340" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(W-MSA + SW-MSA)</text>
                <text x="1000" y="360" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">alternating</text>
                
                <text x="1000" y="520" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">6× Swin Blocks</text>
            </g>
            
            <!-- Arrow 4 -->
            <line x1="1100" y1="350" x2="1160" y2="350" 
                  stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
            
            <!-- Stage 4 -->
            <g id="stage4">
                <rect x="1180" y="150" width="200" height="400" 
                      fill="#e74c3c" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="3" 
                      rx="12" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                <text x="1280" y="180" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Stage 4</text>
                <text x="1280" y="205" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" fill="white">H/32×W/32 × 8C</text>
                
                <!-- Patch Merging -->
                <rect x="1200" y="230" width="160" height="40" 
                      fill="#f39c12" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="1280" y="255" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Patch Merging</text>
                
                <!-- Swin Blocks -->
                <rect x="1200" y="290" width="160" height="60" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="1280" y="315" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Swin Block</text>
                <text x="1280" y="335" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(W-MSA)</text>
                
                <rect x="1200" y="370" width="160" height="60" 
                      fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="2" rx="6"/>
                <text x="1280" y="395" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Swin Block</text>
                <text x="1280" y="415" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" fill="white">(SW-MSA)</text>
                
                <text x="1280" y="520" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="white">2× Swin Blocks</text>
            </g>
            
            <!-- Detailed Swin Block Inset -->
            <g id="swin-detail">
                <!-- Inset background -->
                <rect x="1450" y="600" width="420" height="420" 
                      fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#34495e" stroke-width="3" 
                      rx="12" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                
                <!-- Inset title -->
                <text x="1660" y="635" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#2c3e50">
                    Consecutive Swin Blocks Detail
                </text>
                
                <!-- Input -->
                <rect x="1580" y="660" width="160" height="30" 
                      fill="#95a5a6" stroke="#7f8c8d" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
                <text x="1660" y="680" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Input</text>
                
                <!-- First Swin Block (W-MSA) -->
                <g id="first-block">
                    <!-- LN -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="710" width="160" height="25" 
                          fill="#3498db" stroke="#2980b9" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="727" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Layer Norm</text>
                    
                    <!-- W-MSA -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="745" width="160" height="35" 
                          fill="#e67e22" stroke="#d35400" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="765" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">W-MSA</text>
                    <text x="1660" y="777" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="10" fill="white">(Window Attention)</text>
                    
                    <!-- Residual Add 1 -->
                    <circle cx="1750" cy="762" r="8" fill="#27ae60" stroke="#229954"/>
                    <text x="1750" y="767" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">+</text>
                    
                    <!-- LN -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="790" width="160" height="25" 
                          fill="#3498db" stroke="#2980b9" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="807" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Layer Norm</text>
                    
                    <!-- MLP -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="825" width="160" height="35" 
                          fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="847" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">MLP</text>
                    
                    <!-- Residual Add 2 -->
                    <circle cx="1750" cy="842" r="8" fill="#27ae60" stroke="#229954"/>
                    <text x="1750" y="847" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">+</text>
                </g>
                
                <!-- Second Swin Block (SW-MSA) -->
                <g id="second-block">
                    <!-- LN -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="880" width="160" height="25" 
                          fill="#3498db" stroke="#2980b9" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="897" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Layer Norm</text>
                    
                    <!-- SW-MSA -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="915" width="160" height="35" 
                          fill="#e74c3c" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="935" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">SW-MSA</text>
                    <text x="1660" y="947" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="10" fill="white">(Shifted Window)</text>
                    
                    <!-- Residual Add 3 -->
                    <circle cx="1750" cy="932" r="8" fill="#27ae60" stroke="#229954"/>
                    <text x="1750" y="937" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">+</text>
                    
                    <!-- LN -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="960" width="160" height="25" 
                          fill="#3498db" stroke="#2980b9" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="977" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Layer Norm</text>
                    
                    <!-- MLP -->
                    <rect x="1580" y="995" width="160" height="35" 
                          fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#8e44ad" stroke-width="1" rx="3"/>
                    <text x="1660" y="1017" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">MLP</text>
                    
                    <!-- Residual Add 4 -->
                    <circle cx="1750" cy="1012" r="8" fill="#27ae60" stroke="#229954"/>
                    <text x="1750" y="1017" text-anchor="middle" 
                          font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white">+</text>
                </g>
                
                <!-- Connecting lines for residuals -->
                <line x1="1740" y1="675" x2="1740" y2="754" stroke="#27ae60" stroke-width="2"/>
                <line x1="1740" y1="770" x2="1740" y2="834" stroke="#27ae60" stroke-width="2"/>
                <line x1="1740" y1="850" x2="1740" y2="924" stroke="#27ae60" stroke-width="2"/>
                <line x1="1740" y1="940" x2="1740" y2="1004" stroke="#27ae60" stroke-width="2"/>
                
                <!-- Flow arrows in detail -->
                <line x1="1660" y1="690" x2="1660" y2="705" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="735" x2="1660" y2="740" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="780" x2="1660" y2="785" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="815" x2="1660" y2="820" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="860" x2="1660" y2="875" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="905" x2="1660" y2="910" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="950" x2="1660" y2="955" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
                <line x1="1660" y1="985" x2="1660" y2="990" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
            </g>
            
            <!-- Legend -->
            <g id="legend">
                <rect x="80" y="600" width="300" height="200" 
                      fill="#ecf0f1" stroke="#34495e" stroke-width="2" 
                      rx="8" filter="url(#dropShadow)"/>
                <text x="230" y="630" text-anchor="middle" 
                      font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#2c3e50">Legend</text>
                
                <rect x="100" y="650" width="20" height="15" fill="#3498db"/>
                <text x="130" y="662" font-size="12" fill="#2c3e50">Patch Operations</text>
                
                <rect x="100" y="675" width="20" height="15" fill="#e74c3c"/>
                <text x="130" y="687" font-size="12" fill="#2c3e50">Stage</text>
                
                <rect x="100" y="700" width="20" height="15" fill="#9b59b6"/>
                <text x="130" y="712" font-size="12" fill="#2c3e50">Swin Block</text>
                
                <rect x="100" y="725" width="20" height="15" fill="#f39c12"/>
                <text x="130" y="737" font-size="12" fill="#2c3e50">Linear/Merging</text>
                
                <circle cx="110" cy="755" r="8" fill="#27ae60"/>
                <text x="130" y="760" font-size="12" fill="#2c3e50">Residual Connection</text>
            </g>
        </svg>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
